scene: late evening kitchen, snack drawer raid
world_bible_hooks: §6 Andy lost an AirPod Tuesday, hasn't replaced
§2 Andy on the sofa scrolling, late-night habit
caption_options_considered: 那只 AirPod 还没回来，但夜宵已经开始了。
rationale: Caught-in-the-act line. Concrete moment, no moral. The unspoken context (Andy will see, Andy won't say anything) does the work.
notes_for_next_iteration: Add diamond ◆ on Andy's chest (model dropped it this round)
Consider showing the missing-AirPod ear more clearly
